title: Charlotte Weekend Weather: Rain to Sunshine
summary: Expect scattered rain today, improving to sunshine on Sunday with temperatures near 76 degrees, before rain returns on Monday.
charlotte_impact: Provides a concise weather forecast for weekend planning, impacting local activities and travel.

title: Denver Couple Wins $1.6M in Builder Dispute
summary: A Denver couple won a $1.6 million judgment against Nest Homes for breach of contract and fraudulent misrepresentation related to construction issues.
charlotte_impact: Highlights risks in construction projects and the importance of legal recourse for homeowners.

title: Shelby Officer Suspended for Punching Woman
summary: A Shelby police officer was suspended for punching a woman during an arrest. The officer's identity has not been released.
charlotte_impact: Addresses police misconduct and accountability, raising concerns about law enforcement practices.

title: Wrongful Death Suit Filed in Fatal Plane Crash
summary: Greg Biffle's ex-wife, Nicole Biffle, filed a wrongful death lawsuit alleging negligence in the plane crash that killed 7 at Statesville Regional Airport.
charlotte_impact: Deals with aviation safety and legal responsibility in the aftermath of a tragic accident.

title: Car Break-ins Plague Clover Neighborhood Again
summary: Thieves targeted the Clover neighborhood for the second time, breaking into multiple vehicles and stealing at least one gun this week.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about local crime rates and the need for increased security measures.

title: Salisbury Teacher Charged with Sex Offenses
summary: David Steelman, 51, turned himself in on multiple sex offense charges involving a former student, dating back to 2012.
charlotte_impact: Addresses serious allegations of sexual misconduct by an educator, impacting community trust.

title: Charlotte Douglas Airport Gets $46.9M for Expansion
summary: The FAA awarded Charlotte Douglas $46.9M to expand the airport apron, part of a nationwide effort to modernize aviation infrastructure.
charlotte_impact: Supports airport development and improved aviation infrastructure, benefiting travelers and the local economy.

title: Man Dies Months After Charlotte Hit-and-Run
summary: Frank Leon Dent died 10 months after a hit-and-run in north Charlotte. Police are seeking information on the unknown driver.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the consequences of hit-and-run incidents and the ongoing search for justice.

title: Hit-and-Run Suspect Arrested After Child Struck
summary: Shaiquailalia Di Ndia Lashi Harris was charged with felony hit-and-run after an 8-year-old was struck by a vehicle in south Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the dangers of reckless driving and the legal consequences for offenders.

title: Charlotte Transit Crime Drops 69%
summary: Charlotte's transit system reports a 69% drop in crime on buses and light rail, following security initiatives implemented over the past year.
charlotte_impact: Indicates improved safety and security on public transportation, benefiting commuters.

title: Liquor Purchases Fund Mecklenburg Community Projects
summary: Mecklenburg County liquor purchases fund community projects, with increased funding for law enforcement and alcohol education.
charlotte_impact: Shows how alcohol sales contribute to local community initiatives and public safety.

title: Teenager Drowns in Lake Wylie
summary: A 16-year-old drowned in Lake Wylie after failing to resurface after jumping into the water on Thursday afternoon.
charlotte_impact: Highlights water safety concerns and the tragic consequences of recreational accidents.

title: Woman Killed in Rock Hill Crash
summary: A 50-year-old woman died in a single-vehicle crash on Red River Road after her vehicle hit a fence and overturned.

title: Student Shatters Coach's 41-Year-Old Record
summary: ZaNovia Davis breaks Garinger High's 41-year-old 400m record under coach Tanya Filmore-Scott's guidance, marking a new era.
charlotte_impact: Celebrates athletic achievement and the legacy of coaching, inspiring local students.

title: Multiple Arrests in North Charlotte Drug Case
summary: Federal and local operations lead to multiple arrests in a north Charlotte drug trafficking and firearms case. Four appeared in court.
